60876519.title: Ben Habib
60876519.extract:
Benyamin Naeem Habib (born 7 June 1965) is a British-Pakistani businessman and politician who has been the leader of Advance UK since its foundation in June 2025. He is also the CEO of First Property Group, a commercial property investment company, and chairman of Great British PAC, a pressure group.
Previously, Habib was Deputy Leader of Reform UK from March 2023 to July 2024. Habib was replaced by Richard Tice following the 2024 general election. Habib was a member of the European Parliament (MEP) for London from July 2019 until the UK left the European Union in January 2020. Prior to this, he had donated to the Conservative Party.
